note: CHILD stage. A school sending a report card + parent-teacher conference scheduling notice — school_communication. Hand-derived from taxonomy: comms from a SCHOOL (vs a daycare) are school_communication; a routine human-relationship comm is surface_only, not autonomous. This is the required school-comms-for-a-child case and closes the old 'school maps to daycare_communication' gap.

input.rawContent:
From: office@elmwood-public.schoolboard.ca
Subject: Term 2 report cards now available

Dear families, Term 2 report cards for Grade 3 are now posted to the parent portal. Parent-teacher conferences are the week of March 10; please book a slot through the portal if you would like to meet with Ms. Tran. No action is required if you do not wish to book.
